news-korea-econ.title: Vance takes lead selling Trump’s Iran gamble as Rubio, Hegseth and Ratcliffe cede spotlight on fragile deal
news-korea-econ.description: VP JD Vance defends fragile Iran MOU in Switzerland as reports suggest internal administration split over whether Tehran can be trusted on nuclear deal.

news-global-econ.title: PPFAS Mutual Fund makes contrarian bet on IT stocks
news-global-econ.description: The Nifty IT index is down over 27% this year, driving a sharp compression in valuations. The gauge trades at 15.7 times 2026 estimated price to earnings, down from 21.2 times a year ago

news-global-econ.title: SpaceX falls for third day, erases $600 billion in market value
news-global-econ.description: The stock fell 16% Monday to close at $154.60, the lowest level since the company’s first day of trading, pushing its three-day loss to 23% and erasing over $600 billion in value over that period

news-global-econ.title: Trump says Colombia's 'El Tigre' will be a 'great president' as socialist opponent launches legal challenge
news-global-econ.description: Trump congratulated de la Espriella on his apparent Colombia election win. With 99.9% counted, he leads 49.7% to 48.7%, but rival Cepeda has launched a lchallenge over voting irregularities.
